description: Initial Double Ratchet state fixtures for conformance testing. These represent the ratchet state immediately after initialization from a known shared secret.

initiator_state.note: Initiator calls init_initiator(shared_secret, remote_public). The DH ratchet keypair and remote public key are random per session.

responder_state.note: Responder calls init_responder(shared_secret, dh_keypair). The root_key equals shared_secret. No sending chain key until first DH ratchet.
